name: check_existing_path_guardrails
description: Validate wiki page path and check if it already exists before write. Returns exit_code 0 (new) or >0 (exists with last_update). Prevents accidental overwrites.

steps.action: check if file exists in wiki/
read frontmatter date → last_update = YYYY-MM-DD → return exit_code 1 with timestamp

usage_in_processes.note: Must be replaced with schema_ref → rules/path-guard-check.json
duplicate_check_before_fixation uses validate-path.sh directly (no need for this guard)
